narrative:
Elyria Township has 2,234 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.7%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.0 percentage points.
